headline: Forget CrowdStrike. For 0.59% This Fund Owns It Plus 30 Cybersecurity Rivals
summary: Holders of CrowdStrike (NASDAQ:CRWD) own the household name in cybersecurity, and the stock has rewarded that conviction with a 45.26% year-to-date gain through June 23. The catch is concentration. A single Falcon sensor incident in July 2024 still drags litigation costs across CrowdStrike’s results. The First Trust NASDAQ Cybersecurity ETF (NASDAQ:CIBR) keeps CrowdStrike as its ... Forget CrowdStrike. For 0.59% This Fund Owns It Plus 30 Cybersecurity Rivals

headline: Comp AI Names Auburn Stevens Head of Partnerships
summary: MIAMI, June 24, 2026--Comp AI, an AI-native compliance and security platform built for modern software companies, today announced that Auburn Stevens will join the company as Head of Partnerships. The hire reflects Comp AI’s continued investment in go-to-market expansion as the company scales.

headline: Here’s Burke Wealth Management’s Concerns on CrowdStrike (CRWD) Amid AI Disruption Challenges
summary: Burke Wealth Management, an investment management company, released its “Focused Growth Strategy” first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Fund returned -10.6% in Q1 2026, significantly lagging the S&P 500’s -4.3% returns. The letter noted the quarter as the worst for equities since 2022, with strong corporate earnings being […]
